# Analyze

Assess feasibility against the existing codebase. Reads the relevant idea doc, scans for related patterns and code via MCP tools, and produces 2-3 approaches with tradeoffs.

## When to use

After `/sensei:idea` has produced an idea doc and you want to evaluate whether it's feasible.
